# 1password sysext: 1Password desktop app, relocated from /opt to /usr/lib
/usr/lib/1Password/1password
/usr/lib/1Password/chrome-sandbox
/usr/lib/1Password/1Password-BrowserSupport
/usr/bin/1password
/usr/bin/op-ssh-sign
# Desktop integration: launcher entry and hicolor icons (see yeti/sysexts.md
# "Desktop Applications in Sysexts")
/usr/share/applications/1password.desktop
/usr/share/icons/hicolor/512x512/apps/1password.png
# Boot-time group creation, /etc config injection, and system-auth polkit
# policy (regenerated by mkosi.postinst.chroot)
/usr/lib/sysusers.d/1password.conf
/usr/lib/tmpfiles.d/1password.conf
/usr/share/factory/etc/1password/custom_allowed_browsers
/usr/share/polkit-1/actions/com.1password.1Password.policy
